---
title: "Publications"
pagetitle: "Publications — DigiPols"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: publications
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, author, description, categories]
  date-format: "YYYY"
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: numbered
  feed: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="eyebrow">Publications</div>
  <h1 style="font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 3.6rem); line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.03em; font-weight: 500; max-width: 22ch; margin: 0;">Peer-reviewed papers & reports from DigiPols.</h1>
  <p class="lede">A growing body of work across the four clusters — political communication, monitoring, public opinion and argument mining, and the Forum. Filter by cluster or sort by date.</p>
</div>
```
